title: Principal Radiologist at Aster DM Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Aster DM Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
